title: rungia monetaria
intro: Rungia monetaria, also known as moneywort, is a type of flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Rungia monetaria can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used topically in the form of creams or ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
